# init()

**Initializer**

Creates a transaction metrics instance.

## Declaration

```swift
init()
```

## Discussion

You should never need to create your own [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/URLSessionTaskTransactionMetrics] instances. The [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/URLSession] creates task transaction metrics as part of the [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/URLSessionTaskMetrics] instance that it delivers to the [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/URLSessionTaskDelegate/urlSession(_:task:didFinishCollecting:)] method of [doc://com.apple.foundation/documentation/Foundation/URLSessionTaskDelegate].

## Creating transaction metrics

- **new()**: Creates a new transaction metrics instance.
